name: Solaire 8200 Dixon
bathroomsNote: 1-2 baths depending on unit; specific bath count per floor plan not confirmed from public sources
approxRentRange: $2,840 to $4,311/month for 2BR (1,090-1,247 sq ft); per ApartmentList and Rentable, June 2026

notes.doorman: Multiple listing sources (Trulia, ApartmentList search snippet) cite a doorman and concierge with 24-hour concierge and package service; however, the building's own amenities page lists only 'Concierge Package Room & Lockers' without staffing hours. One review noted concierge staff quality has declined. Classified as 'Likely staffed' rather than 'Confirmed 24h' because the official site does not state 24-hour staffing explicitly.
notes.building: 27-story, 403-unit high-rise opened November 2022; described as Silver Spring's tallest building at time of opening.
notes.petPolicy: Dogs and cats allowed; restricted breeds include pit bulls, rottweilers, and German Shepherds; $250 pet fee plus $50/month pet rent per Rentable.
notes.wellMaintained: 4.1 stars from 52 Yelp reviews as of June 2026; reviews note visually appealing modern finishes but some mention declining concierge quality; no major maintenance complaints surfaced but sample is small.
notes.unitClimate: Air conditioning listed as a unit amenity across multiple listing platforms; thermostat/HVAC type (central vs. in-unit mini-split) not confirmed from public sources, but air conditioning is in-unit rather than building-controlled based on listing language.
notes.1BRDen: No 1BR+den floor plan found on ApartmentList or Rentable listings; only studio, 1BR, and 2BR configurations listed.
